questions.stem: The post office offered NT$575 in ______ for the lost registered letter.
questions.explain: compensation 補償／賠償，claim compensation for… 為固定搭配。communication 通訊、competition 競爭、combination 組合，語意皆不合。

questions.point: 文法：關係代名詞所有格
questions.stem: The applicant ______ resume impressed the manager was hired immediately.
questions.explain: 空格後接名詞 resume，表「他的履歷」，需用所有格關係代名詞 whose。who 作主詞、whom 作受詞、which 用於事物，皆不可直接接名詞表所有。

questions.stem: Foreign currency exchange service is ______ at all major branches.
questions.explain: available 可取得的、可利用的（服務、商品）。capable 有能力的（人）、probable 可能的（事件發生機率）、comfortable 舒適的，均不符「服務可供使用」語意。

questions.stem: The new regulation will take effect ______ March 1.
questions.explain: 明確日期用 on（on March 1）；月份、年份用 in（in March）；時刻用 at（at 9:00）。

questions.stem: The ______ must show a valid ID card when picking up the registered mail.
questions.explain: recipient 收件人（人）。reception 接待／收訊、receipt 收據、recipe 食譜——四字形近，考試常互為誘答，以「人／物」區分最快。

questions.stem: The delivery was delayed ______ the heavy typhoon.
questions.explain: because of ＋名詞片語（the heavy typhoon）；because 後接完整子句。although 表讓步、so that 表目的，語意不合。

questions.stem: This coupon will ______ at the end of June, so please use it soon.
questions.explain: expire 到期、失效（票券、證件、契約）。expand 擴大、explore 探索、export 出口，字首相同易混。

questions.stem: All parcels ______ carefully before they are loaded onto the truck.
questions.explain: 包裹是「被檢查」，需用被動語態 are inspected。主詞 parcels 與 inspect 為被動關係，A、C、D 皆為主動形式。

questions.stem: She went to the post office to ______ her salary into the savings account.
questions.explain: deposit 存入（款項）；deposit money into an account 為常見搭配。dispose 處置（dispose of）、deserve 應得、describe 描述。

options: where is the nearest post office
where the nearest post office is
the nearest post office is where
where does the nearest post office
questions.explain: 間接問句採「疑問詞＋主詞＋動詞」的直述句語序：where the nearest post office is。A 是直接問句語序，置於 tell me 之後不合文法。

questions.stem: Please send the documents by express mail; the matter is quite ______.
questions.explain: urgent 緊急的，與 express mail（快捷）語意呼應。vacant 空的、distant 遙遠的、instant 立即的（instant noodles），-ant 結尾形近誘答。

questions.stem: There isn't ______ information about the new service on the website yet.
questions.explain: information 為不可數名詞，否定句用 much。many、a few、several 皆修飾可數複數名詞。
